name: PAY_DIMENSION_USAGES_VL
query: SELECT pdu.DIMENSION_USAGE_ID DIMENSION_USAGE_ID, pdu.BALANCE_DIMENSION_ID BALANCE_DIMENSION_ID, pdu.DATABASE_ITEM_SUFFIX DATABASE_ITEM_SUFFIX, pdutl.DIMENSION_NAME DIMENSION_NAME, pdutl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, pdu.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pdu.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, pdu.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, pdu.USE_IN_EXCEP_REPORTING_FLAG USE_IN_EXCEP_REPORTING_FLAG, pdu.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pdu.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pdu.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pdu.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pdu.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pdu.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pdu.MODULE_ID, pdu.SGUID SGUID FROM PAY_DIMENSION_USAGES pdu, PAY_DIMENSION_USAGES_TL pdutl WHERE pdutl.DIMENSION_USAGE_ID = pdu.DIMENSION_USAGE_ID AND pdutl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
